creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
plasma5-plasma-pa-5.12.5

during config stage:
couldn't generate metainfo for org.kde.plasma.volume: Incompatible processor. This Qt build req. the foll. features:
f16c
Aborted.


Install stage:

Fails to install after compilation:
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/audio/plasma5-plasma-pa/work/stage/usr/local/share/metainfo/org.kde.plasma.volume.appdata.xml: No such file or directory
---

I've got CPUTYPE?=ivybridge in /etc/make.conf
It's VirtualBox 5.2.8 box ran on Core i7-3610QM

The failure blocks me from building kde5 - is there any way to switch off the port dependency?

ports tree , kernel & world latest.

Thank you for development.
